ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batsmen" (
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batsman */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the batsman */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the batsman represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the batsman */,
  "playing_style" TEXT /* Playing style of the batsman */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the batsman */,
  "career_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the batsman in their career */,
  "career_average" REAL /* Average runs scored by the batsman in their career */,
  "career_strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the batsman in their career */,
  "dismissals" INTEGER /* Total number of dismissals in their career */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the batsman in their career */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Number of fifties scored in their career */,
  "hundreds" INTEGER /* Number of hundreds scored in their career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batsman_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowlers" (
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowler */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the bowler */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the bowler represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the bowler */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the bowler */,
  "bowling_hand" TEXT /* Bowling hand of the bowler */,
  "career_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the bowler in their career */,
  "career_average" REAL /* Average runs conceded by the bowler in their career */,
  "career_economy" REAL /* Economy rate of the bowler in their career */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling figures achieved by the bowler in their career */,
  "five_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls in their career */,
  "ten_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of ten-wicket hauls in their career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match */,
  "team1" TEXT /* Name of the first team */,
  "team2" TEXT /* Name of the second team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Player awarded the man of the match */,
  "umpires" TEXT /* Names of the umpires officiating the match */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the match referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2 FOREIGN KEY ("team2") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1 FOREIGN KEY ("team1") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of matches won by the team */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of matches lost by the team */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of matches that ended in a draw */,
  "total_ties" INTEGER /* Total number of matches that ended in a tie */,
  "team_ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organization hosting the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Names of the sponsors for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match detail */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the batsman */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Balls faced by the batsman */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Fours hit by the batsman */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Sixes hit by the batsman */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the batsman */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled by the bowler */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled by the bowler */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the bowler */,
  "noballs" INTEGER /* Number of no-balls bowled by the bowler */,
  "wides" INTEGER /* Number of wides bowled by the bowler */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the bowler in the match */,
  "total_runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Total runs conceded by the bowler in the match */,
  "dots" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls bowled by the bowler */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("batsman_id") REFERENCES batsmen ("batsman_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match score */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "overs_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled by the team */,
  "wickets_lost" INTEGER /* Number of wickets lost by the team */,
  "run_rate" REAL /* Run rate of the team in the match */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Total number of extras in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_matches" (
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player match */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the match */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Balls faced by the player in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "overs_bowled" INTEGER /* Overs bowled by the player in the match */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player in the match */,
  "fielding_performance" TEXT /* Fielding performance of the player (e.g., catches, run-outs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES batsmen ("batsman_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments_matches" (
  "tournament_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
